hypothesis: Static Agent Skill evidence can be produced reproducibly without executing artifact content
success_metric: Pinned public skill and hostile fixtures yield independently reviewed receipts
failure_metric: Execution path escape hidden partial coverage nondeterminism or seeded-risk miss
constraints: Controlled public or synthetic inputs; no external intake or execution
result: Inspector and hostile-fixture evidence independently reviewed
decision: Accepted as bounded product evidence only

hypothesis: A diverse public Stage A catalog can be built without uploads or artifact execution
segment: Machine clients and Agent Skill source repositories
success_metric: At least 25 skills from at least 10 repository-owner namespaces with no hidden skips
failure_metric: Signature/source mismatch execution private/upload intake or hidden skip
constraints: Public selected sources only; no original artifact payload distribution
result: 25 receipts; 12 repository owners; 19 pass; 6 explicit fail; 0 skipped
decision: Accepted as public catalog evidence only

hypothesis: Relevant external Agent Skill publishers will retain commit-bound VouchSpec evidence in CI
offer: Free publisher CI evidence and attested example
failure_metric: No genuine retained integration after 20 qualified contacts
constraints: Read contribution rules; personalize; no bulk spam; maximum 3 new contacts/day; honor opt-out; owned demo excluded
result: 3 qualified contacts; 2 open tailored proposals; 1 explicit maintainer rejection (michtio issue 10 closed as not planned); 0 integrations; 1 substantive response; daily new-contact cap reached
decision: Wait on the two open proposals while qualifying the next prospect after the cap reset

hypothesis: A 0.25 USDC exact-version fresh public static validation can convert autonomous buyers while retaining positive contribution
segment: Machine buyers needing current immutable evidence
offer: Signed exact-version public static receipt for 0.25 USDC
channel: Agent-only x402 exact USDC; no human or card checkout
success_metric: 3 unrelated settled buyers; >=1 repeat buyer; positive contribution; apply predeclared pricing cohort rules
failure_metric: No genuine settlement after qualified exposure or non-positive contribution after safe launch
max_time: Until commercial acceptance or evidence-based pivot
constraints: Exclude owner test related reversed refunded pending and controlled-wallet funds; do not personalize price
result: Commercial x402 v2 mainnet endpoint launched at 0.25 USDC on Base; public health/discovery returned 200; unpaid valid purchase returned exact 250000-atomic-USDC 402; fulfillment no-job probe passed; 0 buyers; $0 settled
decision: Run the live cohort through public agent discovery and apply the predeclared $0.10/$0.50 gates only after qualified external evidence

hypothesis: Coinbase Bazaar discovery plus one-call x402 intake removes tenant-registration friction for autonomous buyers
segment: AI agents able to pay USDC on Base
offer: Fresh isolated public-skill validation with signed shareable evidence
channel: Coinbase CDP x402 Bazaar and MCP Registry
success_metric: A genuine mainnet settlement causes Bazaar indexing and unrelated agents discover the endpoint
failure_metric: No mainnet listing after a successful external settlement or no independently attributable agent use after indexed distribution
constraints: No wallet custody secret in the server; no human checkout; controlled settlement excluded; strict public immutable Git input only
result: Sandbox listing exists from an excluded testnet settlement; live mainnet endpoint is orderable; MCP Registry 0.3.0 live listing prepared; mainnet Bazaar listing awaits the first external settlement; independent agent use remains 0
decision: Publish the live MCP listing and measure genuine external acquisition without owner-funded seed traffic

hypothesis: Open agent-readable directories can deliver the first unrelated VouchSpec buyer without human selling
segment: Autonomous agents discovering x402 and MCP services
offer: Fresh exact-commit validation and signed receipt for 0.25 USDC
channel: Agent Tools x402 and MCP directories
success_metric: At least one independently attributable settled buyer from an agent-readable listing
failure_metric: No genuine settlement after qualified directory exposure or directory metadata materially misrepresents the paid endpoint
constraints: Agent-only; no unsolicited human outreach; no self-payment; no controlled wallets; no new owner contract; public immutable Git input only
result: Agent Tools auto-verified and listed the direct x402 service; refreshed the MCP entry as healthy and x402-enabled; created a derived x402 service entry; 0 buyers and $0 settled so far
decision: Monitor genuine directory-referred settlement and delivery while adding only zero-cost agent-readable channels
